What's inside

Built for the road ahead.

Every tool an owner-operator needs to make smarter decisions and keep more of what they earn.

🧮
Load Calculator
Net pay per load — up to 4 stops, with fuel, deadhead, tolls, and expenses factored in.
Premium
🗺️
Live Load Map
Browse 123Loadboard loads on an interactive map with real rate-per-mile color coding.
Free
📊
Insights Dashboard
Weekly earnings, gross vs net, profit per load. Know exactly where your money goes.
Premium
🔗
Bank Sync via Plaid
Connect your bank to auto-pull real expenses into your net pay calculations.
Premium
⛽
Live Fuel Prices
Real-time diesel at nearby stations, automatically factored into every calculation.
Free
🌦️
Route Weather
Driving condition warnings for your route before you hit the road.
Free
  Pricing  

Start free. Upgrade when ready.

Download and get 7 days of Premium free. No credit card at download.

Standard
Free
Core tools to evaluate loads and track your operation. Always free after your trial.
  • ✓ Live load map with 123LB
  • ✓ Live diesel fuel prices
  • ✓ Route weather alerts
  • ✓ Document & POD storage
  • ✓ iOS & Android
Download for Free
7-day free trial
Premium
$79.99/mo
Full profitability intelligence for serious operators.
  • ✓ Everything in Standard
  • ✓ Load Calculator (up to 4 stops)
  • ✓ Insights & analytics dashboard
  • ✓ Expense breakdown via Plaid
  • ✓ Plan-aware map pins & filters
  • ✓ Priority support
Start Free Trial
⚠ Early access pricing.  Premium rises to $99.99/mo after Dec 31, 2026.

Meet Synthia.

Your AI freight assistant. Ask anything about your loads, lanes, and profitability — 24/7.

You
OKC to Dallas, $1,400, 12-mile deadhead in a semi. What's my true net?
Synthia
Estimated fuel: ~$127
Deadhead cost: ~$38
Tolls: ~$22
True net: ~$1,213  ·  $2.33/mi
That load looks profitable. ✓
